title: [Brayern Isle, Jungle Path]
description: Opening out of thick jungle on either side of the path is a small, canopied clearing.  In the center, some stone benches have been set so travelers may rest in this glade.  Alongside them is a simple bamboo fountain.  Lanterns line the area's perimeter, with openings facing only inward so as to not cast excess light into the jungle.  A winding, boulder-strewn path leads visibly toward the cliff face and a dense vine-twisted opening leading up to a narrow platform above.
